headline: BofA makes hard call on HubSpot stock after earnings
summary: HubSpot gave investors a first-quarter report that showed several positive headline numbers, but Bank of America came away focused on a different part of the story. The firm downgraded HubSpot to underperform from buy and cut its price objective to $180 from $300, arguing that the ...

headline: Costco cashes in as Americans skip restaurants
summary: Many Americans are feeling financially strained these days. And when we look at how inflation is trending, it's easy to see why. The Consumer Price Index rose 3.3% on an annual basis in March. Although fuel oil mostly drove the increase, food costs rose substantially as well — particularly ...

headline: How The Construction Partners (ROAD) Narrative Is Shifting After Diverging Analyst Valuations
summary: Construction Partners is back in focus after a fresh price target cut to $139 from $142, which narrows the implied upside and tightens the valuation range around the stock. This adjustment sits alongside more bullish research that lifts a separate target to $147, leaving you with a split analyst backdrop built from the same fiscal Q1 and model updates. Read on to see what is driving each camp’s view and how you can track the evolving narrative from here. Analyst Price Targets don't always...

headline: The Fed Could Keep Rates on Hold Forever. What It Means for Your Cash.

headline: Banking groups and crypto advocates clash over stablecoin rewards in Senate bill
summary: Investing.com -- A high-stakes legislative battle has intensified between the traditional banking sector and the cryptocurrency industry as a key Senate panel prepares to mark up a landmark digital asset bill next week.
